parsed_review.summary: CP00-524 is a descriptor-only AI governance (RP17.P02) fixture+test slice pack (10 units, risk A, range RP17.P02.M06.S16-RP17.P02.M07.S03), reviewed via Read/Grep/Glob only. Pack scope is internally consistent across the live plan (closeout-pack-plan.json pack[0], deviation_from_plan=false, ledger sha 13c7ed65...), baseline, manifest, registry binding AI_GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP524_PACK_BINDING, contract current_pack, and the last historical_pack_bindings entry (CP00-524). Deliverable distribution {implementation:3, failure_recovery:2, test:4, contract:1} and micro split M06:7 / M07:3 match across all sources. The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly NOT asserted: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review, and the production_ready_flag (ai_governance_core_p02_fixture_test_slice_descriptor_verified) is descriptor-verification-scoped rather than a runtime/enterprise-trust claim. No-write/no-real-data boundary holds: a grep of packages/ai-governance/src returned zero filesystem/network/child_process/Date/random/crypto usage, and every CP524 result and no_write_attestation sets writes_product_state, writes_audit_event, dispatches_*_runtime, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, and loads_real_fixture_data to false with synthetic_only/no_real_data=true. Tests (model.test.js CP524 cases + validate-rp17 script) assert coverage, descriptor-only rows, evidence packets, handoff (CP00-524-to-CP00-525, next RP17.P02.M07.S04), and authority boundary; command-evidence.json records node --check/--test, rp17:ai-governance-core:validate, npm test, npm run validate, and git diff --check all exit 0. Hermes evidence packets are deterministic validation objects (gate H17), not product runtime; Claude authority boundary is read-only with claude_is_final_approval / promotes_claude_to_final_approval / claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation all false, consistent with the stated authority boundary (human final approval required, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). Review evidence chain is clean per CP178+ hardening: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1444-byte valid JSON, not 0-byte/malformed), prompt 2177<25600 bytes with no embedded full diff/source, tools restricted to Read,Grep,Glob (forbidden_tools_present=false). Unrelated dirty files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html, workbook/* docx/zip/md) are correctly classified as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and not attributed to this pack. The package is not imported into any product runtime path (only its validator, test, contract, and evidence reference it). Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are expected-absent at this pre-review stage; manifest pack_level_claude_review.status=pending with empty valid_review_receipts. Examined-and-accepted nuances (not findings): the additive no_write_attestation carries validates_scope_contract_foundation_descriptor_only=true forward from the CP514 base across all 11 packs (accurate, intentional accumulation), and the Hermes production_ready_candidate=true denotes descriptor-layer validation success only, explicitly distinct from pack production_ready=false. No P0-P2 issues; the pack does not over-claim readiness and respects all no-write/no-real-data/read-only-reviewer boundaries.
